findings.description: The hint `例外処理` has no basis in the source. The s4 source section contains only the sentence "特別な処理は必要ないため、実装しない。" — no mention of exceptions or exception handling. `バッチエラー処理` is similarly an inference not grounded in source text.
findings.source_evidence: Source s4: "特別な処理は必要ないため、実装しない。" — the word 例外 (exception) does not appear anywhere in this section.
